home.intro: GGToolkit brings together our free sites and resources for players in one place: calculators for pity and damage, a Genshin database, a similar-games finder, mobile game codes, an in-game currency comparator and PC buying guides. All fast, no sign-up, and built to help you play better.

about.body:
GGToolkit is an ecosystem of free tools and resources for the gaming community. We build calculators, databases and comparators that answer concrete player questions: how far you are from pity, how much damage your Pokémon deals, which codes are still active, where to get resources without falling for scams, or which PC to build.

Our philosophy is simple: less filler, more answers. All our tools are free, no sign-up and multilingual. This hub gathers them so you can find them easily and discover the ones you don't know yet.

Behind GGToolkit is a team of players building what we'd want to use ourselves. Suggestions or bugs? Get in touch:

methodology.body:
At GGToolkit we take accuracy seriously. These are the rules we build every tool and guide by:

Verified data

Our calculators use formulas validated against recognised references (for example, Pokémon damage is validated against the Pokémon Showdown engine). Redeem codes are tested in-game before publishing. Prices are compared per real unit.

Updates

Databases and rankings are kept up to date with every relevant game update. We show the date when it builds trust.

No smoke

We don't promise "hacks" or magic shortcuts. If something is a scam (like free currency generators), we say so plainly. Our value is honest usefulness, not clickbait.

Free and open

Everything is free and no sign-up. We fund ourselves discreetly to keep the tools online.

consent.text: We use cookies to analyse traffic and improve the site.

footer.tagline: Free tools for gamers. Less filler, more answers.
footer.disclaimer: GGToolkit is an independent project made by fans. Game trademarks belong to their respective owners.
